nasb.text: It is He who made the earth by His power, Who established the world by His wisdom; And by His understanding He has stretched out the heavens.

esv.text: It is he who made the earth by his power, who established the world by his wisdom, and by his understanding stretched out the heavens.

cnv.text: 耶和華用自己的能力創造了大地， 用自己的智慧堅立了世界， 又用自己的聰明展開了諸天。

ccb.text: 耶和华施展大能， 用智慧创造大地和世界， 巧妙地铺展穹苍。
